long_description: Customers in the BR-SAO region may experience intermittent 500 errors from services hosted in SAO04 due to a network issue.
customer_facing_impact: COS Customers in SAO04 may have received intermittent 500
chronology:
====== SAO04 Switch Issue Timeline ======

UTC24	        CST	Description
   11/30/25		
21:38 UTC	3:38 PM	Customers began to get IAM 500's
21:45 UTC	3:45 PM	Network team starts investigating issues with Primary switch is04.sr01.sao04
21:48 UTC	3:48 PM	Network team gets monitoring alert showing failover switch fes01.slr01.sao04 is down
21:52 UTC	3:52 PM	Latency alert came in - [#82990657] Turnaround-time latency in sao04 (br-sa) has exceeded the threshold  (latencies cross 1 sec) (DETECTION)
21:54 UTC	3:54 PM	IAM 500's Alert came in
22:10 UTC	4:10 PM	Network team started #warroom-vpc-inc10443305 for this issue on Primary switch is04.sr01.sao04
22:11 UTC	4:11 PM	911 Call started
22:22 UTC	4:22 PM	IAM Team confirms a switch issue is occurring in #iam-issues (IDENTIFICATION)
22:28 UTC	4:28 PM	IAM Team states issue has been resolved (FALSE HOPE)
22:45 UTC	4:45 PM	Datapath Incident created:  INC10443545
22:50 UTC	4:50 PM	SAO04 Latencies recover
23:44 UTC	5:44 PM	Post in 911 channel showing curl failures
   12/1/25		
00:33 UTC	6:33 PM	Primary switch is04.sr01.sao04 replaced and ports enabled (MITIGATION)
00:37 UTC	6:37 PM	IAM 500 errors stop
